message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="scott-wlaschin" color="yellow" summary="Consensus confirmed, domain review approved">
Confirming my consensus approval stands. I had no blocking issues in my initial review -- the domain model, type design, glossary, and error types were all solid. No re-review needed from my side.

9/9 consensus: **approved** (domain architecture).
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged. Scott's domain architecture approval for Step 6 is confirmed. We're accumulating consensus approvals -- waiting for the team lead to complete the driver rotation so Carson can start Step 7 work.
